core_fields.name: Script Project Name
core_fields.purpose: Human-readable project label for builder agents.

core_fields.name: Apps Script Project ID
core_fields.purpose: clasp/script identifier for the Apps Script project.

core_fields.name: Script URL
core_fields.purpose: Direct Apps Script editor or deployed script URL.

core_fields.name: Drive File ID
core_fields.purpose: Drive file identifier for the script container or related source artifact.

core_fields.name: GitHub Repository
core_fields.purpose: Source repository location for builder handoff.

core_fields.name: Branch
core_fields.purpose: Active source branch for builder handoff.

core_fields.name: Builder Status
core_fields.purpose: Operational routing field for builder workflow only. It is not production approval, curriculum readiness, or deployment approval.

core_fields.name: Next Action
core_fields.purpose: Operational routing instruction for the next builder step only. It is not a governance approval or production readiness decision.

core_fields.name: Blocking Issue
core_fields.purpose: Operational blocker summary for builder workflow only. It is not curriculum readiness, production approval, or source-of-truth ownership. Blank means no known blocker.

status_interpretation.ready: Builder Status is Ready, required metadata is complete, and Blocking Issue is blank. This means ready for builder attention only, not production readiness.
status_interpretation.blocked: Builder Status is Blocked, or Blocking Issue is not blank. This is an operational blocker state only.
status_interpretation.missing_metadata: Any required metadata field except Blocking Issue is blank.

governance_boundary.source_of_truth_assumption: No source-of-truth ownership is decided by this support layer.
